title: The Commander Battles Intensify
description: On pages 12–12, this part focuses on Unknown person #13, Queen as The Skull Dome battles reach their final forms as Sanji, Zoro, Kid, Law, Yamato, and the alliance push back against the emperors and their commanders.
scene: The Skull Dome battles reach their final forms as Sanji, Zoro, Kid, Law, Yamato, and the alliance push back against the emperors and their commanders.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #13
dialogue.text: Get out of my sight, scum.
